content: In je-dev-skills, do not treat code/tests passing as the end of a non-trivial work stream. Before offering merge, PR, or branch-finish options, complete AGENTS.md loop steps 6 and 7: write the handover/lesson, then remove the ephemeral plan so it cannot accumulate on main.
context: Session 2026-05-30: eval live-path integration initially stopped after verification and branch-finish options, leaving the handover/lesson and plan deletion undone despite tickets being complete.
title: Close je-dev-skills work streams with handover and plan deletion
